framing: Product Manager laid off in tech downsizing, seeking similar role quickly

jd.title: Senior Product Manager — Platform

requirements.text: 6+ years of product management experience in B2B SaaS or developer tools
Experience defining product strategy and roadmaps for platform or infrastructure products
Strong technical background — ability to engage deeply with engineering on API design and architecture
Experience with data-driven product decisions (experimentation, cohort analysis, funnel metrics)
Experience managing products used by developers or technical users
Track record of launching products that achieved measurable business impact
Experience with observability, monitoring, or cloud infrastructure products
CS degree or equivalent technical background
Excellent written communication for PRDs, strategy docs, and stakeholder alignment

responsibilities: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap for platform API products
Partner with engineering to design APIs, define technical requirements, and ship high-quality features
Drive product launches end-to-end including go-to-market coordination with sales and marketing
Analyze product usage data to identify opportunities, measure impact, and prioritize features
Write detailed PRDs and specifications that enable engineering execution
Present product strategy and results to VP Product and executive stakeholders

expected_output.summary: Product Manager with 7 years of B2B SaaS experience at Twilio and Atlassian, specializing in developer platform and API products. Led API platform team at Twilio shipping features adopted by 15K+ developer accounts. CS background with hands-on technical depth in API design, experimentation frameworks, and PLG growth motions. Recently impacted by workforce reduction; seeking senior PM role in developer tools or platform products.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager — Communications Platform
bullets: Owned product strategy and roadmap for Twilio's Programmable Messaging API serving 15K+ developer accounts
Launched 3 major API features (Conversations API v2, Content Templates, Delivery Insights) driving $8M incremental ARR
Designed experimentation framework for API adoption; ran 12 A/B tests on onboarding flows improving day-7 activation by 22%
Partnered with engineering team of 14 to define API contracts, rate limiting strategy, and backward compatibility policies
Wrote product strategy documents and quarterly business reviews for VP Product and CTO

experience.title: Product Manager — Jira Platform
bullets: Managed Jira REST API and webhook products used by 5K+ marketplace app developers
Led PLG initiative for Jira Cloud free tier, contributing to 40% increase in self-serve signups
Defined and tracked platform health metrics (API latency P95, error rates, developer NPS)
Coordinated cross-team dependencies across 4 squads for quarterly platform releases

experience.title: Program Manager Intern
bullets: Contributed to Azure DevOps feature planning and user research for CI/CD pipeline experience

education: BS Computer Science — University of Michigan (2014-2018)

jd_requirements: 6+ years product management B2B SaaS developer tools
deliberate_flaws: Laid off from Twilio (workforce reduction) — gap since Oct 2024
Intern experience is very thin (1 bullet)
PLG experience is indirect (Jira free tier, not core PLG product)
